title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 270.070 - Animals may be driven along public highways
text:
270.070.  Animals may be driven along public highways. — Nothing contained in this law shall be construed as to prevent owners or other persons from driving any of the species of animals enumerated in this chapter from one place to another or along any public highway.
(RSMo 1939 § 14469) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12803; 1919 § 4281; 1909 § 778
